creator: estartu@augusta.de
text:
I have Updated my system from the deprecated lpt driver to the ne ppbus
driver and nlpt. But then my Printer HP Laserjet 4L stopped to work 
propperly. About 1/8 of the Page ist printed as expected but then 
normal text is printet over the Graphics output. I Think thats a 
transmission problem with the Bitronics interface of this printer an 
the ppbus driver.

Fix: 

I Think the problem has to do with the HP bitronics Paralell interface
How-To-Repeat: It repeats every time i use a kernel with ppbus driver. With lpt 
driver it works fine.
